name: movscript_create_generation_job
description: Create an AI image or video generation job through MovScript and return the generated output resource for review. Before choosing model_config_id, input_resource_ids, or extra_params, call movscript_list_models and obey the selected model's contract: capabilities, input_requirements, supported_param_keys, supported_params, and params_schema. Submit only parameters and reference counts supported by that model. Unsupported or locally suspicious parameters are reported in param_validation audit_version 1 with dropped keys, alias rewrites, and non-blocking preflight_errors; reference-count mismatches are reported in input_preflight_errors. preflight_errors and input_preflight_errors are explanatory audit data, not backend rejection by themselves. Backend validation errors are authoritative; suggested_fix may drive a single generation-parameter retry, but UNSUPPORTED_OUTPUT_TYPE and INVALID_INPUT_COUNT are explanation/model-or-input-selection cases and must not be auto-repaired against the same request.

job_type.description: Exact generation job type. Prefer this when the selected model contract requires image or video inputs.

input_resource_ids.description: Reference image or video resource IDs. Count must satisfy the selected model contract input_requirements; mismatches are reported in param_validation.input_preflight_errors.

reference_type.description: Use video with output_type video when reference resources should create a video_v2v job.

aspect_ratio.description: Top-level generation aspect ratio when supported by the selected model contract.

duration.description: Top-level video duration in seconds when supported by the selected model contract.

extra_params.description: Model-specific generation parameters. Keys must come from the selected model contract returned by movscript_list_models. Do not guess provider-wide parameters; unsupported keys are omitted before backend submission and reported in param_validation audit_version 1.

status.description: Current or final backend generation status.

jobId.description: Generation job ID for monitoring and audit.

monitor.description: Present when the job needs asynchronous monitoring.

param_validation.description: audit_version 1 parameter filtering and preflight audit.

terminal.description: Whether status is terminal when wait=true.
